Setup & Sync Guide: SETUP & SYNC GUIDE
Mobile field inspection  ·  live console  ·  Excel + Google Sheets  ·  cloud + intranet
✓  Supervisors inspect from their phone via a Google Form. Every submit updates the CONSOLE sheet instantly — flat-wise, block-wise, floor-wise and work-wise.
1.  HOW A SUPERVISOR INSPECTS  (on the phone)
1) Open the inspection link (share it on WhatsApp or save to the phone home screen).
2) Enter name, then pick Block, Floor and Flat from drop-downs.
3) Pick the work being inspected (e.g. Tile Work) — the form jumps to ONLY that checklist.
4) Tap OK / NOT OK / N/A for each check. Most take a few seconds.
5) On the last page, for every NOT OK item snap a photo and name the file with the check ID (e.g. TIL-005).
6) Press Submit. Done — it appears on the Console immediately.
2.  ONE-TIME SETUP  (about 10 minutes, do once)
A) Put this workbook in Google Sheets: upload the .xlsx to Google Drive → right-click → Open with → Google Sheets (or File → Save as Google Sheets).
B) In the Sheet: Extensions → Apps Script. Delete the sample code, paste the file "JainGroup_QC_FormBuilder.gs" provided with this workbook, and click Save.
C) In the toolbar choose the function  buildInspectionForm  and click Run. Approve the permission prompt. It builds the whole form automatically and prints the links in View → Logs.

D) Open the form's EDIT link → go to the last page "Photos & Submit" → Add question → type "File upload" → title it EXACTLY:  Defect photos (name each file with its check ID)  → allow multiple files. (Google blocks scripts from creating upload questions, so this one is added by hand.)
E) Back in Apps Script, run  installTrigger  once (this makes submissions flow into the Inspection Log).
F) Press the form's SEND button → link icon → copy the live link and share it with your supervisors.
3.  THE CONSOLE  (your monitoring dashboard)
• Live KPI cards: checks logged, OK, defects, open defects, rectified, pass rate.
• DRILL-DOWN: pick any Block / Floor / Flat / Work Type (or "All") to see that scope's result instantly.
• Tables by Block and by Work Category, plus an Open Defects list with photo links.
• The Inspection Log sheet holds every check (one row each) — filter or sort it freely; the Console reads from it.
• To close a defect: set Rectified? = Yes in the Inspection Log (and paste the after-photo). The Open Defects count drops automatically. (A re-inspection from the form also records the fix.)
4.  WORKS IN EXCEL & GOOGLE SHEETS

The form + auto-sync run in Google Sheets (that is where Google Forms live). The workbook itself — every sheet, colour-coding, drop-down and the Console formulas — also opens in Microsoft Excel for offline viewing/printing.
Note: the Open Defects list uses the FILTER function (Google Sheets and Excel 365). The KPI cards and the By-Block / By-Category tables work in every version.
5.  SYNC VIA CLOUD
Google Workspace (recommended — the form needs it): keep the Sheet in a shared Drive folder; it syncs and co-edits in real time. Defect photos save automatically to your Drive.
Microsoft 365: for offline/Excel use, store the .xlsx on OneDrive/SharePoint with AutoSave on for co-authoring and version history.
6.  SYNC VIA INTRANET

Place the workbook on a mapped network drive / shared folder (e.g. \\jaingroup-server\QC\) with read-write access for the QC team; on-prem SharePoint works like the cloud option. Keep exported photos in a sub-folder beside it so links resolve across the intranet. Cloud (Section 5) is preferred for live multi-user editing.
7.  GOOD PRACTICE
• Do not delete CONFIG (drop-downs) or rename the Master Checklist / Inspection Log / Console sheets — the script and formulas rely on those names.
• Add or edit checks on the Master Checklist, then re-run buildInspectionForm to refresh the form.
• Keep one master copy as the source of truth once it is on cloud / intranet.
Console: QUALITY CONTROL CONSOLE  ·  LIVE INSPECTION MONITOR
Updates automatically every time a supervisor submits an inspection from the field
DRILL-DOWN  —  pick any Block / Floor / Flat / Work Type
OPEN DEFECTS  (Block · Floor · Flat · Item · Check · Photo)
